column8: Angular red bricks and concrete fragments with some dark grey sand and domestic rubbish. (FILL)
Sub-rounded GRAVEL and COBBLES of weathered andesitic clasts and tuff with some brown silty sand. (ALLUVIUM)

Strong, pinkish grey spotted black and white, slightly decomposed to moderately decomposed GRANITE, with medium to coarse grains, and occasionally closely spaced, very narrow to medium to narrow, rough planar, limonite and manganese stained joints dipping 10 degrees-20 degrees, 40 degrees-50 degrees & 70 degrees-80 degrees. 20.86m-21.86m: moderately strong, brownish red, pinkish grey and white, moderately decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE.
